from django.http import JsonResponse
from django.views import View

from .models import Employee


class EmployeeExportView(View):
    def get(self, request):
        employees = Employee.objects.filter(active=True).select_related(
            "department", "manager"
        ).values("id", "name", "department__name", "manager__name")
        rows = [
            {
                "id": e["id"],
                "name": e["name"],
                "department": e["department__name"],
                "manager": e["manager__name"],
            }
            for e in employees
        ]
        return JsonResponse({"employees": rows})
